events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a crew using a field method that is less tidy than the preferred shop approach but still matches the listed product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. The work is in-progress.

This is a pass situation - the work matches instructions and requirements, just less tidy than preferred. No non-compliance.
